authoring.description: Proof packs and generated payloads are tracked, but content is not yet claimed as pilot-ready.

review.description: Pack is ready for curriculum, accessibility, safeguarding and teacher review.

pilot.description: Pack can be promoted to a limited pilot cohort after warnings are acknowledged and reviewed variant banks exist.

release.description: Pack can be used broadly after reviewed variant banks, evidence thresholds and rollback snapshots are complete.
